title: Monsoon Delight Mousse
description: A refreshing and creamy dessert made with monsoon delight, a vegan alternative to traditional mascarpone. This light and airy mousse is perfect for warm weather.
instructions: In a blender, combine Monsoon Delight, maple syrup, lemon juice, vanilla extract, aquafaba, coconut cream, and sugar-free vanilla beans.
Blend on high speed for 2-3 minutes, or until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or ramekins.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until set.
Serve chilled, garnished with fresh fruit or nuts if desired.
Note: Be sure to adjust the amount of maple syrup to your taste, as Monsoon Delight can be quite sweet.
